findings.description: The candidate rules completely miss the strict layout and legal requirement in unit u_content_pattern_rules_9_0003, which prohibits reproducing legal lines, job codes, Indication, and ISI outside of locked header/footer components.

payload.description: Never reproduce the Priovant logo, copyright line, ® legal line, job code [mm/yy], Indication, and ISI within sections, as they must only live in the locked header/footer components.

findings.description: The candidate rule for clinical claims footnotes misses the governance reference tag (§1.2) mentioned in the source unit.

payload.description: Clinical claims require footnote markers (†) with footnote text clearly separated and noticeably smaller (§1.2).
